section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Only 3 of the 4 asset columns are populated (the 4th/rightmost column is entirely blank - no stock name, ticker, or fills - and is not emitted as a row). All 3 assets are SP. Selections are black-filled cells. EIF marker row: SPY and VIG marked EIF; the MS Auto-Callable note (SPZRJ) is not (the header EIF row shows the row label plus two column markers). Transaction row is a black band spanning the 3 populated columns with no P/S/E letter - treated as divider/redaction, transaction null. Value of Asset (staircase): D ($15,001-$50,000)->SPY, F ($100,001-$250,000)->VIG, G ($250,001-$500,000)->SPZRJ. Type of Income: None->SPY and SPZRJ (cols 1 & 3, gap at VIG), Dividends->VIG. Amount of Income: A:None->SPY and SPZRJ (cols 1 & 3), D ($1,001-$2,500)->VIG.

rows.asset_name: MS Auto-Callable Buffered Jump Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX 50 Index due Sept. 4, 2023

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled across the 3 populated columns
uncertainties.note: black band with no P/S/E letter; likely formatting divider/redaction, recorded null for all three assets
